flags.description: Master toggle for PermissionResolver. Off = every check returns TRUE (fail-open, emergency-only). NEVER set off in production without an active incident + change-approval.
Off = resolver always hits DB. Emergency toggle if the cache substrate corrupts. 40x slower steady-state performance.
Off = skip steps 1–2 of the algorithm (deny/allow grants). Only for cases where access/grants is having a bad day and pure RBAC must serve traffic.
Off = skip step 4 (delegation). Emergency toggle when access/delegation is unreachable.
Off = disable Redis pubsub cross-node invalidation. Nodes fall back to TTL-based eviction only.
Off = TenantProvisioned no longer triggers TenantDefaultRoleSeeder. Tenants ship with zero roles until admins run `rbac:seed-defaults` manually. Useful during multi-tenant migrations.
Off = allow modifications to is_system=true rows. NEVER set off in production. Reserved for platform migrations that need to rename a system role across every tenant.
Off = disable GuardMismatch refusals. NEVER set off in production. Reserved for platform bootstrap where a temporary guard-crossing migration is unavoidable.
Off = disable the sampled `Permission Check Performed` analytics events. Cuts a small amount of segment volume during high-traffic events.
Off = ignore expires_at writes (assignments live forever until revoked). Emergency toggle if the hourly purge job is misbehaving.
